description: Style NoteAn all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure your trousers or jeans, or act as a styling detail to jazz up your outfit. This belt from french connection is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.Product DetailsTang clasp with a fixed loop to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in placeHoles to customise fitTwo strands with stitch detailling for styleMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineUse a leather conditioner to protect the leather
